The BPS is a two-on-one gas-fired combined-cycle power station. The Facility is
configured with two (2) Gas Turbines (43 MW each) and a single Steam Turbine/Power
Generator (25 MW).

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Plant shutdown for gas turbine repairs reduced overall production for 2022. Previously only used speciation profiles contained in "VOC Speciation Calculator Methodology Updates for CAPP", WSP 2018 whereas this year we have combined this with profiles from the EPA SPECIATE 5.2 database to create more comprehensive profiles.
